Title: The 4 Stages of Sleep Architecture
Description: Discover the 4 stages of sleep architecture over a typical 8-hour night. Learn the differences between Light Sleep, Deep Sleep, and REM Sleep to help optimize your evening routine.

Title: How to Optimize Your Sleep Environment
Description: Transform your bedroom into a sleep sanctuary. Discover how the optimal temperature (65°F), blackout curtains, white noise, and clean air can support your rest.

Title: The 10-3-2-1-0 Sleep Rule for Better Rest
Description: Looking to improve your evening routine? Follow the 10-3-2-1-0 rule: 10 hours before bed no caffeine, 3 hours no heavy meals, 2 hours no work, 1 hour no screens, and 0 times hitting snooze!

Title: Chronotypes Explained: Lion
Keywords: Are you a Lion, Bear, Wolf, or Dolphin? Understanding your sleep chronotype can help you match your daily schedule with your natural biological clock.

Title: The Cortisol vs. Melatonin See-Saw
Description: Learn about the relationship between cortisol and melatonin! Cortisol typically peaks in the morning for daytime alertness, while melatonin rises at night to signal rest.

Title: The 4-7-8 Breathing Technique for Relaxation
Description: Explore the 4-7-8 breathing technique. Inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 7 seconds, and exhale for 8 seconds to help support a relaxed state.

Title: 5 Common Signs of Elevated Cortisol
Description: Learn about common signs of elevated cortisol: feeling tired during the day, sweet cravings, restless sleep, and difficulty concentrating.

Title: Adaptogens 101: Nature's Stress Managers
Description: Learn about adaptogenic herbs like Ashwagandha, Rhodiola Rosea, Holy Basil, and Cordyceps, which are often used to help support the body's natural response to daily stressors.

Title: The Stress Bucket Model: Why You Feel Overwhelmed
Description: Why do you feel overwhelmed? The Stress Bucket model explains how daily stressors (the filling) can overflow if you don't have healthy coping mechanisms (the draining) like exercise and sleep.

Title: 4 Vagus Nerve Relaxation Tips
Description: Explore 4 simple ways to support your body's relaxation response through the vagus nerve: cold exposure, humming, diaphragmatic breathing, and gargling water.
